steps.code: <?php require '/wordpress/wp-load.php'; require_once ABSPATH . 'wp-admin/includes/plugin.php'; $wc = 'woocommerce/woocommerce.php'; $cp = 'copypilot-for-woocommerce/copypilot-for-woocommerce.php'; foreach ( array( $wc, $cp ) as $p ) { $r = activate_plugin( $p ); if ( is_wp_error( $r ) ) { echo 'ACTIVATION FAILED ' . $p . ': ' . $r->get_error_message(); } } echo 'activated';
